description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of white and dark panels, with large windows arranged in horizontal rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house includes a driveway with two parked cars, a green lawn area, and a backyard with a patio and pool. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a spacious living area, dining room, kitchen, and bedrooms, all visible through the open floor plan. The main entryway is accessible via a paved path leading to a prominent front door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large horizontal windows, and a minimalist design featuring a driveway, lawn, and backyard patio with pool.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, two cars, and a clear view into the living and dining areas, with the backyard patio and pool visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard lawn, patio, and the back facade with large windows and a secondary entry point.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the driveway and cars in the foreground, and a clear look at the main living spaces and backyard patio.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entryway, paved path, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors on the facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide, modern door, paved path, and no porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism.
